description: Maps an ERP lifecycle event to the Wave status / deliveryStatus fields pushed via PUT /admin/orders/{id}. Configured in Wave Settings.

fields.description: ERP DocType whose lifecycle event triggers this rule (Sales Order today; Pick List / Delivery Note / Sales Invoice / Payment Entry as later phases land).
fields.label: ERP DocType

fields.description: ERPNext lifecycle hook firing the rule. submit / cancel cover the canonical state changes; update_after_submit covers in-place transitions like delivery_status flipping to Delivered; after_insert fires on first save (used for Pick List, where creation is the operator-meaningful action).
fields.label: ERP Event

fields.description: Optional. When set, the rule only matches if doc.<field> equals the configured value. Used to discriminate update_after_submit transitions, e.g. delivery_status=Delivered.
fields.label: Condition Field

fields.description: Required when Condition Field is set. Compared with str(doc.<field>) for equality.
fields.label: Condition Value

fields.description: Optional. When set, the rule contributes status=<this> to the Wave PUT body. Pulled from the Wave Status catalogue so values stay aligned with Wave's API.
fields.label: Wave Status

fields.description: Optional. When set, the rule contributes deliveryStatus=<this> to the Wave PUT body. Pulled from the Wave Delivery Status catalogue.
fields.label: Wave Delivery Status

fields.description: Free-form note explaining what this rule expresses, shown in the rules grid.
fields.label: Description

name: Wave Status Rule Outbound
